direction:
i want to use the concept of the image attached for duberymnl. use duberymnl fonts logo and product.
Understood:

- Product default: **bandits-green** — the translucent lime-green inner lining and tropical-pattern arms are the obvious pick to anchor the monochrome-green world. - DUBERY integration: brand logo rendered as an embroidered chest patch on the jacket in the custom italic bold DUBERY font (warm white stitching) — subtle and scene-native rather than overlay typography. Background stays clean apple-green. Default aspect: **4:5** unless you tell me otherwise.
